title: MassTech Lasers
body:
A Custom Made Mod based on Direwolfs LaserIO 

 

Its all Designed the Same Different Textures( Tho some items are still the same for the fact of it just being easy) Most will change over time to make it look different

You Can Move Items, Power , Redstone Signals, Just as simple as that



this mod was designed for the use in My Modpack but you are very much welcome to use it in yur packs

 

 

Requires MassTech The Mod(Temporary)
Requires HybridLib
Requires Patchouli


This Mod with Direwolfs also is MIT and will Stay MIT 

Discord for Bug Reporting https://discord.gg/kmwBeCh65v
